metadata.page_title: Burning Death Speed Freeks Army List

special_rules.name: Special Rules
special_rules.text: The Mob Rule (see Mob Rule ) and Power of the Waaagh! (see Power of the Waaagh! ) rules apply to all Ork formations.

formations.name: Blitz Brigade
formations.units_text: Any four of the following units: Deth Kopta, Flakwagon, Gunwagon
formations.restrictions_or_notes:
Add any number of the following units for +25 points each: Boyz, Guntrukk, Skorcha, Warbikes, Warbuggy
Add any number of the following units for +35 points each: Deth Kopta, Flakwagon, Gunwagon
Add up to one of the following units for +35 points each: Nobz (and a Trukk), Nob Warbikes
Add up to one Mekboy Speedsta for +50 points
Add any number of Gunfortresses for +125 points each
formations.raw_text: Blitz Brigade | Any four of the following units: Deth Kopta, Flakwagon, Gunwagon | 150 | 250 | 350

formations.name: Fortress Mob
formations.units_text: Any two of the following units: Battlefortress, Gunfortress
formations.restrictions_or_notes:
Add any number of Boyz for +25 points each
Add any number of Flakwagons for +35 points each
Add up to one of the following units for +35 points each: Nobz (and a Trukk), Nob Warbikes
Add any number of Battlefortresses for +115 points each
Add any number of Gunfortresses for +125 points each
formations.raw_text: Fortress Mob | Any two of the following units: Battlefortress, Gunfortress | 275 | 475 | 675

formations.name: 0–1 Kill Kroozer
formations.restrictions_or_notes: Replace the Kill Kroozer with a Battlekroozer for +50 points
formations.raw_text: 0–1 Kill Kroozer | One Kill Kroozer | 150 | n/a | n/a

formations.name: Kult Of Speed
formations.units_text: Any eight of the following units: Guntrukk, Skorcha, Warbikes, Warbuggy
formations.restrictions_or_notes:
Add any number of the following units for +25 points each: Guntrukk, Skorcha, Warbikes, Warbuggy
Add any number of the following units for +35 points each: Deth Kopta, Flakwagon, Gunwagon
Add up to one Nob Warbikes for +35 points
Add up to one Mekboy Speedsta for +50 points
formations.raw_text: Kult Of Speed | Any eight of the following units: Guntrukk, Skorcha, Warbikes, Warbuggy | 200 | 350 | 500

formations.name: Warband
formations.units_text: One Nobz, three Boyz and four Trukks, plus any four of the following units: Guntrukk, Skorcha, Warbikes, Warbuggy
formations.restrictions_or_notes:
Add any number of the following units for +25 points each: Big Gunz, Boyz and a Trukk, Guntrukk, Skorcha, Stormboyz, Warbikes, Warbuggy
Add any number of the following units for +35 points each: Battlewagon, Deth Kopta, Flakwagon, Gunwagon
Add up to one Nobz (and a Trukk) for +35 points
Add up to one Mekboy Speedsta for +50 points
Replace any number of Nobz (and a Trukk) with an equal number of Nob Warbikes for free
formations.raw_text: Warband | One Nobz, three Boyz and four Trukks, plus any four of the following units: Guntrukk, Skorcha, Warbikes, Warbuggy | 200 | 375 | 550

formations.name: Warbike Outriders
formations.restrictions_or_notes:
None
Note: All units in the formation have Scout

formations.name: Fighta Sqwadron
formations.restrictions_or_notes: Add up to six Fighter-Bombers for +50 points each
formations.raw_text: Fighta Sqwadron | Three Fighter Bombers | 150 | n/a | n/a

profiles.name: Mekboy Bad Ork Bikerboy
parse_warnings: Boolean weapon line folded into previous weapon for Mekboy Bad Ork Bikerboy.

profiles.name: Trukk
abilities_or_notes: May transport one infantry units without Jump Packs or Mounted . With the exception of Big Gunz, transported units do not have to disembark in order to shoot or use their firefight value if this unit is able to shoot, assault or lend support.

profiles.name: Battlewagon
abilities_or_notes: May transport two infantry units without Jump Packs or Mounted ; only one of the two units may be a Big Gunz; plus one unit of Grotz.

profiles.name: Flakwagon
abilities_or_notes: May transport one infantry unit without Jump Packs or Mounted .

profiles.name: Gunwagon
abilities_or_notes: May transport one infantry unit without Jump Packs or Mounted .

profiles.name: Battlefortress
abilities_or_notes: May transport eight infantry units without Jump Packs or Mounted ; only one of the eight units may be a Big Gunz; plus four units of Grotz. Critical Hit Effect: Move the unit D6cm in a random direction, all units under it suffer a hit. The unit is destroyed and all units being carried are destroyed unless they roll a 6+.

profiles.name: Gunfortress
abilities_or_notes: May transport four infantry units without Jump Packs or Mounted ; only one of the four units may be a Big Gunz; plus two units of Grotz. Critical Hit Effect: Move the unit D6cm in a random direction, all units under it suffer a hit. The unit is destroyed and all units being carried are destroyed unless they roll a 6+.

profiles.name: Landa
abilities_or_notes: May transport ten infantry units (except Big Gunz), light vehicle units, Killa Kans or Dreadnoughts; plus four units of Grotz. Light vehicles and Dreadnoughts count as two units each. Critical Hit Effect: The unit and all units being carried are destroyed.

profiles.name: Battlekroozer
abilities_or_notes: May transport twelve Landas and the units being carried on them.

army_notes.name: Using The Army List
army_notes.text:
Unlike the very rigid formations used by the Imperium, Ork formations vary widely in both size and composition. The rules for creating Ork formations reflect this. The different types of Ork formations you may choose are shown on the army list that follows. The army list includes the following information:
Type
The name of the formation.
Core Units
The units that make up the formation. An Ork player can choose to double or triple the number of units in the formation if he wishes. A formation with double the normal number of units is called a big formation, and a formation with three times the normal number of units is called a ’uge formation.
Cost
Most Ork formations have three values. The first value is the cost for the basic formation, the second is its cost if it is a big formation, and the third value is its cost if it is a ’uge formation. If the formation only has one cost then it may not be increased in size. Up to one third of the points available to an Ork army can be spent on aircraft and Gargants.
Extra Units
An Ork formation may include any of the extra units listed in the Extras column. You may include any number of extra units in a formation unless it is specifically noted otherwise. If there is a limitation then the limit is doubled for a big formation and tripled for a ’uge formation. All of the core, extra, and free units in an Ork formation count as being part of one large formation. The different units may not move off on their own.
